title: [FEATURE]: Added the new STT and Media Upload Features with Account Endpoints for NPM Package @pollinations_ai/sdk
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: The hive has ears (and memory)
gist.blurb: We've supercharged the NPM SDK. You can now transcribe audio, upload media, check your Pollen balance, and even let users bring their own Pollen to your apps.
gist.summary: The @pollinations_ai/sdk package has been updated with new methods for Speech-to-Text transcription, media uploading, account management, and Bring Your Own Pollen (BYOP) authorization.
gist.impact: Developers can now easily integrate Whisper audio transcription, handle media uploads, and build apps where users spend their own Pollen credits, all through simple SDK methods.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with audio equipment (representing STT) and storage media (representing uploads), alongside a ledger or coin purse (representing account/BYOP features).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny retro headphones and holding a pixelated microphone, standing next to a chunky 8-bit boombox and a stack of floppy disks. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'SDK V4'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
